name: Honey Shortbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 300°F (150°C).
2. In a large bowl, beat together butter, honey, and vanilla extract until light and fluffy.
3. Gradually add flour, one cup at a time, beating well after each addition. If the dough becomes too stiff, mix in any remaining flour by hand.
4. Add chopped pecans and blend them into the dough.
5. Pat the dough into an 11-inch square baking dish or ungreased 9-inch cast-iron skillet.
6. Score the surface of the dough with a sharp knife, dividing it into 24 wedges.
7. Prick the dough deeply along the score marks with a fork.
8. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes, or until lightly browned.
9. Remove from the pan and let cool on a wire rack for 10 minutes.
10. Cut the shortbread into wedges while still warm, then allow it to cool completely before serving.
